commandsRun.command: meta_harness/.venv/bin/python -m pytest meta_harness/tests/contract/test_foundation_types.py -v -k "TestHandoffRecordMessageProtocol or TestHandoffRecordCreatedAt or TestHandoffRecordFrozen or langsmith_run_id_defaults_to_none or status_defaults_to_queued or test_project_id_is_str" -o cache_dir=.pytest_cache_found_008_014
commandsRun.observation: Collected 51 tests, ran 10 selected tests, all 10 passed (41 deselected) in 0.25s.

assertions.title: HandoffRecord implements message protocol (`id` field)
assertions.reason: Message-protocol tests passed for id presence/type and add_messages behavior with distinct/same IDs.

assertions.title: HandoffRecord id is derived from handoff_id
HandoffRecord langsmith_run_id defaults to None
assertions.reason: Default-value test passed for omitted langsmith_run_id.

assertions.title: project_id is a plain str
assertions.reason: Type-hint test passed confirming project_id is plain str (no reducer annotation).

assertions.title: HandoffRecord created_at is RFC3339 compatible
assertions.reason: Serialization roundtrip test passed using RFC3339-compatible datetime parsing.

assertions.title: HandoffRecord status defaults to queued
assertions.reason: Default status test passed with omitted status field.

assertions.title: HandoffRecord is immutable/frozen after creation
assertions.reason: Mutation attempts on brief and status correctly raised exceptions in frozen-model tests.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions via focused pytest contract run; all assigned assertions passed.
